title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
